scope.summary: Bug fix with 3 clear US provided by user, no ambiguity

architecture.summary: Changes scoped to claude-cli.ts, add.ts, marketplace/ in vskill CLI

integrations.summary: Interacts with claude CLI via execSync; registerMarketplace return type changes from boolean to {success,stderr}; backward-compat required for all callers

ui-ux.summary: TTY confirmation prompt for single-plugin marketplace; --yes flag bypasses; pre-install overview line before scan; dim stderr in error output

performance.summary: One retry on failed registration adds at most one extra execSync call; no perf concerns for CLI tool

security.summary: No security changes; existing blocklist and tier1 scan remain; temp dir detection is a reliability fix not security

edge-cases.summary: Temp dir prefix detection via os.tmpdir(); non-TTY with no --yes already handled; empty marketplace.json; invalid JSON in manifest; unreachable source URL
